title: How to Use Claude Code for FREE (2026)
summary: Nick Saraev demonstrates how to use Claude Code for free or at minimal cost by routing through NVIDIA-NIM, OpenRouter, Ollama for local models, and alternatives like DeepSeek V4 Flash. The video includes setup instructions for each method and references a full 4-hour Claude Code course.
